About.metaDescription: The story behind the lens. Amit Banuz — photographer and creator. Based in Israel, shooting worldwide.
About.storyP1: I'm Amit — a photographer who found his path in an unexpected way. After serving as a combat soldier, a motorcycle accident shifted my whole perspective. During recovery I picked up a camera and never put it down.
About.storyP2: A trip to Sri Lanka gave me clarity — I knew I wanted to capture real moments and the raw energy of the ocean. Since then I've been shooting across the Philippines, Sri Lanka, Israel, and soon Australia.
About.storyP3: I work up close. Whether I'm in the water with surfers or documenting your event, I focus on what's real — the energy, the emotion, the connections. No forced poses. No setups. Just life as it happens, through my lens.
About.approachP1: For surf I shoot in-water — as close to the action as I can get. At events I blend into the crowd, catching natural reactions and moments that won't happen again. My editing is clean and cinematic — I let the image do the talking.
About.approachP2: Every shoot is personal. I want to get your vision, your energy, what makes your moment yours. That's what ends up in the final shots.

Contact.metaDescription: Get in touch with Amit Banuz. Available for photography, content creation, and creative projects.
